verdict: 2PI common-mode mechanism extends structurally (Gamma_2 pattern-independent functional + Feynman-Hellmann + common dressing); leading retains R-U10-3 operator-monotone >=0 (lam'>0); residual = the a0-bound on the pattern-dependent skeleton Gamma_2[G_*(P)]-Gamma_2[G_*(R_H)]

claims.name: skeleton_functional_pattern_independent
claims.detail: (Gamma_2[G] = sum of 2PI skeletons depends on G and the bare vertices ONLY, not explicitly on the condensate P: a structural fact of the CJT 2PI effective action. P enters Gamma only via the tree, the lam'P^2 G term, and implicitly through G_*(P))

claims.name: feynman_hellmann_at_stationary_G
claims.detail: (dGamma/dG=0 at G_* => dF/dP = dGamma/dP|_{G_*} (explicit only); the strong-fluctuation content is in G_* but the P-derivative sees only the explicit condensate coupling -- the basis for the common-mode split)

claims.name: common_dressing_pattern_independent
claims.detail: (D_0(I)=r_hat=0.3367=r_R+2lam'I depends only on I, not the pattern => the common-sea part of Gamma (including Gamma_2[G_*^common]) cancels in F[P]-F[R_H]; the pattern-dependent residual is O(a0))

claims.name: repulsive_vertex_monotone_sign
claims.detail: (lam'=3u_eff=8.055>0 repulsive => the dressed log-det difference is operator-monotone >= 0 (R-U10-3 extended to the dressed common sea); the pattern-dependent skeleton correction is O(a0)=0.096)

claims.name: residual_is_a0_bound_on_skeleton
claims.detail: (LOAD-BEARING RESIDUAL: bound the pattern-dependent skeleton Gamma_2[G_*(P)]-Gamma_2[G_*(R_H)] by O(a0)~0.096 times Delta F_margin (non-perturbatively, via the common-mode structure), NOT a skeleton-by-skeleton perturbative estimate. The common-mode MECHANISM extends; the a0-bound is the residual)
